Guideline: Formal register. Uses Anda (formal you, always capitalized) consistently.
Indonesian is largely gender-neutral by nature.
Standard Indonesian: capitalize first word and proper nouns.
Standard double quotes for feature names.
Space-separated compounds: Pengaturan perilaku, Katalog perilaku. Note: library is translated as katalog (not perpustakaan).
Many retained: Check-in, Widget, Analytics Hub, Feedback, Chat, Benchmarking, Data Modeler, PII, API, CSV, SFTP, Proxy, Template. Adapted: Kompensasi, Entitas.
Bare verb for buttons: Publikasikan, Batal, Hapus. Imperative for instructions: Pilih..., Tentukan...
Enable: Aktifkan fitur X or Aktifkan widget X. Confirmations: Apakah Anda yakin ingin...? Success: ...berhasil dipublikasikan. Empty states: Belum ada...

Check-in=Check-in; Review=Ulasan; Goal=Tujuan; Worker=Pekerja; Manager=Manajer; Compensation=Kompensasi; Behavior=Perilaku; Library=Katalog; Career Development=Pengembangan Karier; Settings=Pengaturan
